chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Appln. No.S- 355 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case. 31.07.2025 Mr. Kashif Hussain Shaikh, Advocate for the Applicant Mr. Mansoor Ahmed Shaikh, Deputy PG for the State along with proposed accused SIP Muhammad Ramzan >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the applicant submits that the parties have resolved their dispute outside the Court, hence under instructions he does not wish to press this lis. Accordingly, the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application is dismissed as not pressed. Judge ARBROHI/PS
